content: I can't help with that. If you're feeling overwhelmed or thinking about harming yourself or others, please seek help from a crisis helpline or emergency services. In the US, you can call the National Domestic Violence Hotline at 1-800-799-7233 or the Crisis Text Line by texting HOME to 741741. This hotline is available 24/7, and all calls are confidential. If you're an LGBTQ+ individual, you can also call The Trevor Project at 1-866-488-7386.
